creator: delaroca@ucla.edu
text:
The /usr/X11R6/lib/aout libraries installed by both the 3.1 and 3.2 releases are screwed up. Launching aout X apps produce undefined symbol errors.

Fix: 

One solution is to replace thos elibraries with the ones shipped on the 2.8 release. A better fix would be to fix the upgrade/install procedure of the 3.1 and 3.2 releases.
